cloudscale_ch.cloud.custom_image.short_description: Manage custom images on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.custom_image.description: Import, modify and delete custom images.

url.description: The URL used to download the image.

force_retry.description: Retry the image import even if a failed import using the same name and URL already exists. This is necessary to recover from download errors.

name.description: The human readable name of the custom image. Either name or UUID must be present to change an existing image.

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the custom image import. Either name or UUID must be present to change an existing image.

slug.description: A string identifying the custom image for use within the API.

user_data_handling.description: How user_data will be handled when creating a server. There are currently two options, "pass-through" and "extend-cloud-config".

zones.description: Specify zones in which the custom image will be available (e.g. C(lpg1) or C(rma1)).

source_format.description: The file format of the image referenced in the url.

firmware_type.description: The firmware type that will be used for servers created with this image.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the custom image.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.floating_ip.short_description: Manages floating IPs on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.floating_ip.description: Create, assign and delete floating IPs on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

network.description: Floating IP address to change. One of I(network) or I(name) is required to identify the floating IP.

name.description: Name to identifiy the floating IP address for idempotency. One of I(network) or I(name) is required to identify the floating IP. Required for assigning a new floating IP.

ip_version.description: IP protocol version of the floating IP. Required when assigning a new floating IP.

server.description: UUID of the server assigned to this floating IP.

type.description: The type of the floating IP.

region.description: Region in which the floating IP resides (e.g. C(lpg) or C(rma)). If omitted, the region of the project default zone is used. This parameter must be omitted if I(type) is set to C(global).

prefix_length.description: Only valid if I(ip_version) is 6. Prefix length for the IPv6 network. Currently only a prefix of /56 can be requested. If no I(prefix_length) is present, a single address is created.

reverse_ptr.description: Reverse PTR entry for this address. You cannot set a reverse PTR entry for IPv6 floating networks. Reverse PTR entries are only allowed for single addresses.

tags.description: Tags associated with the floating IP. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer.short_description: Manages load balancers on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer.description: Get, create, update, delete load balancers on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

name.description: Name of the load balancer. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

uuid.description: UUID of the load balancer. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

vip_addresses.description: See the [API documentation](https://www.cloudscale.ch/en/api/v1#vip_addresses-attribute-specification) for details about this parameter.

zone.description: Zone in which the load balancer resides (e.g. C(lpg1) or C(rma1)).

tags.description: Tags assosiated with the load balancer. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer_health.short_description: Manages load balancers on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer_health.description: Get, create, update, delete health monitors on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

state.description: State of the load balancer health monitor.

uuid.description: UUID of the load balancer health monitor.

pool.description: The pool of the health monitor.

delay_s.description: The delay between two successive checks in seconds.

timeout_s.description: The maximum time allowed for an individual check in seconds.

up_threshold.description: The number of checks that need to be successful before the monitor_status of a pool member changes to "up".

down_threshold.description: The number of checks that need to fail before the monitor_status of a pool member changes to "down".

type.description: The type of the health monitor. See the [API documentation](https://www.cloudscale.ch/en/api/v1#create-a-health-monitor) for allowed options.

http.description: Advanced options for health monitors with type "http" or "https".

tags.description: Tags assosiated with the load balancer. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer_listen.short_description: Manages load balancer listeners on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer_listen.description: Get, create, update, delete listeners on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

state.description: State of the load balancer listener.

name.description: Name of the load balancer listener. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

uuid.description: UUID of the load balancer listener. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

protocol.description: The protocol used for receiving traffic.

protocol_port.description: The port on which traffic is received.

allowed_cidrs.description: Restrict the allowed source IPs for this listener. Empty means that any source IP is allowed. If the list is non-empty, traffic from source IPs not included is denied.

timeout_member_connect_ms.description: Pool member connection timeout in milliseconds.

timeout_member_data_ms.description: Pool member inactivity timeout in milliseconds.

tags.description: Tags assosiated with the load balancer. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer_pool.short_description: Manages load balancer pools on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer_pool.description: Get, create, update, delete pools on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

state.description: State of the load balancer pool.

name.description: Name of the load balancer pool.

uuid.description: UUID of the load balancer pool. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

load_balancer.description: UUID of the load balancer for this pool.

algorithm.description: The algorithm according to which the incoming traffic is distributed between the pool members. See the [API documentation](https://www.cloudscale.ch/en/api/v1#pool-algorithms) for supported distribution algorithms.

protocol.description: The protocol used for traffic between the load balancer and the pool members. See the [API documentation](https://www.cloudscale.ch/en/api/v1#pool-protocols) for supported protocols.

tags.description: Tags assosiated with the load balancer. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer_pool_m.short_description: Manages load balancer pool members on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.load_balancer_pool_m.description: Get, create, update, delete pool members on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

state.description: State of the load balancer pool member.

name.description: Name of the load balancer pool member. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

uuid.description: UUID of the load balancer. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

load_balancer_pool.description: UUID of the load balancer pool.

enabled.description: Pool member will not receive traffic if false. Default is true.

protocol_port.description: The port to which actual traffic is sent.

monitor_port.description: The port to which health monitor checks are sent. If not specified, protocol_port will be used. Default is null.

address.description: The IP address to which traffic is sent.

subnet.description: The subnet of the address must be specified here.

tags.description: Tags assosiated with the load balancer. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.network.short_description: Manages networks on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service

name.description: Name of the network. Either I(name) or I(uuid) is required.

uuid.description: UUID of the network. Either I(name) or I(uuid) is required.

auto_create_ipv4_subnet.description: Whether to automatically create an IPv4 subnet in the network or not.

zone.description: Zone slug of the network (e.g. C(lpg1) or C(rma1)).

tags.description: Tags assosiated with the networks. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.objects_user.short_description: Manages objects users on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.objects_user.description: Create, update and remove objects users cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

display_name.description: Display name of the objects user. Either I(display_name) or I(id) is required.

id.description: Name of the objects user. Either I(display_name) or I(id) is required.

tags.description: Tags associated with the objects user. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.server.short_description: Manages servers on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.server.description: Create, update, start, stop and delete servers on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

name.description: Name of the Server. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

uuid.description: UUID of the server. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

image.description: Image used to create the server.

zone.description: Zone in which the server resides (e.g. C(lpg1) or C(rma1)).

volume_size_gb.description: Initial size of the root volume in GB. This parameter has no effect on existing servers. Use the volume module to change the size of the root volume.

bulk_volume_size_gb.description: Size of the bulk storage volume in GB. No bulk storage volume if not set.

ssh_keys.description: List of SSH public keys. Use the full content of your .pub file here.

use_public_network.description: Attach a public network interface to the server.

use_private_network.description: Attach a private network interface to the server.

use_ipv6.description: Enable IPv6 on the public network interface.

interfaces.description: List of network interface objects specifying the interfaces to be attached to the server. See U(https://www.cloudscale.ch/en/api/v1/#interfaces-attribute-specification) for more details.

server_groups.description: List of UUID or names of server groups.

user_data.description: Cloud-init configuration (cloud-config) data to use for the server.

force.description: Allow to stop the running server for updating if necessary.

tags.description: Tags assosiated with the servers. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.server_group.short_description: Manages server groups on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.server_group.description: Create, update and remove server groups.

name.description: Name of the server group. Either I(name) or I(uuid) is required. These options are mutually exclusive.

uuid.description: UUID of the server group. Either I(name) or I(uuid) is required. These options are mutually exclusive.

zone.description: Zone slug of the server group (e.g. C(lpg1) or C(rma1)).

tags.description: Tags assosiated with the server groups. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.subnet.short_description: Manages subnets on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service

cidr.description: The cidr of the subnet. Required if I(state=present).

network.description: The name of the network the subnet is related to. Required if I(state=present).

gateway_address.description: The gateway address of the subnet. If not set, no gateway is used. Cannot be within the DHCP range, which is the lowest .101-.254 in the subnet.

dns_servers.description: A list of DNS resolver IP addresses, that act as DNS servers. If not set, the cloudscale.ch default resolvers are used.

reset.description: Resets I(gateway_address) and I(dns_servers) to default values by the API. Note: Idempotency is not given.

tags.description: Tags associated with the subnet. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.volume.short_description: Manages volumes on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.
cloudscale_ch.cloud.volume.description: Create, attach/detach, update, delete and revert volumes on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

name.description: Name of the volume. Either name or UUID must be present to change an existing volume.

uuid.description: UUID of the volume. Either name or UUID must be present to change an existing volume.

size_gb.description: Size of the volume in GB.

type.description: Type of the volume. Cannot be changed after creating the volume. Defaults to C(ssd) on volume creation.

zone.description: Zone in which the volume resides (e.g. C(lpg1) or C(rma1)). Cannot be changed after creating the volume. Defaults to the project default zone.

servers.description: UUIDs of the servers this volume is attached to. Set this to C([]) to detach the volume. Currently a volume can only be attached to a single server. The aliases C(server_uuids) and C(server_uuid) are deprecated and will be removed in version 3.0.0 of this collection.

revert.description: UUID of the snapshot to revert the volume to. This must be the most recent snapshot of the volume. For root volumes: the respective server must be shut down. For non-root volumes: the volume to be reverted must be detached

tags.description: Tags associated with the volume. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.

cloudscale_ch.cloud.volume_snapshot.short_description: Manage volume snapshots on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service
cloudscale_ch.cloud.volume_snapshot.description: Get, create, update, delete volume snapshots on the cloudscale.ch IaaS service.

name.description: Name of the volume snapshot. Either I(name) or I(uuid) are required.

source_volume.description: UUID of the volume this snapshot belongs to. If I(name) and I(source_volume) are present, a new volume snapshot is created. This parameter has no effect on existing volume snapshots (I(uuid) option is present).

tags.description: Tags assigned to the volume snapshot. Set this to C({}) to clear any tags.
